name: Dazzling Cacao Cookie
description: Born from the darkest, most obscure parts of his Kingdom, Dazzling Cacao Cookie is the evil counterpart of the great and resolute King Dark Cacao Cookie. Dazzling Cacao Cookie showcases all the opposite from Dark Cacao Cookie. He’s a heavy spirit of chaos, is driven by darkness, likes to cause mischief everywhere, and sometimes, he abuses his power as King to get anything he wants. He’s also a cookie that knows how to use seduction upon cookies, and can hypnotize anyone that catches his eyes.
creator: Shade Tomlinson
